strategy: Worker adds the /hello route to demo-service/service.py and a corresponding unittest. CoS verifies via test run.

context.description: the dispatch table is ROUTES; add new entries there
existing tests; new test file goes here

objectives.title: Add /hello route to demo-service
objectives.description: Add a GET /hello route that returns 200 with body 'hello world'. Insert the entry into ROUTES in demo-service/service.py.
criteria: demo-service/service.py contains a /hello entry in ROUTES with status 200 and body 'hello world'
calling handle('/hello') from a Python REPL returns (200, 'hello world')

objectives.title: Add unittest for /hello
objectives.description: Add a test in demo-service/tests/test_hello.py that asserts both criteria from obj-1.
criteria: demo-service/tests/test_hello.py exists and contains a unittest.TestCase
test passes when run with: python3 -m unittest discover demo-service/tests
running the full test suite reports at least 3 tests (existing 2 + new)

context.description: existing test file as a template
